title: Python Wrapper Strategy Config
description: Outer wrapper config for a Python strategy hosted by the engine runtime.

python_module.description: Importable Python module containing the strategy class.

python_class.description: Strategy class name inside the configured module.

python_search_path.description: Optional search path prepended to sys.path before importing the module.

python_strategy_config.description: Nested strategy-owned JSON config passed through to the wrapped Python strategy.
